title: Peppery Ukrainian Paprika Crispy Stir-fry
description: A spicy and indulgent Ukrainian dish featuring a blend of paprika, icing sugar, and other Mediterranean-friendly ingredients that are stir-fried to perfection.

ingredients.name: 1 onion, finely chopped
ingredients.notes: Provides a mild sweetness that complements the paprika

ingredients.name: 3 cloves garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: Adds a savory flavor to balance the spices

ingredients.name: 200g (7oz) chicken breast, sliced into thin strips
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with tofu or firm plant-based protein for a vegan option

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon ground pepper
ingredients.notes: Provides the peppery kick to this dish

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons paprika
ingredients.notes: Enhances the spiciness and adds color to the dish

ingredients.name: 1 cup boiling water
ingredients.notes: Used in a marinade for tenderizing chicken if needed

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: Adds brightness and acidity to the dish

instructions: In a bowl, mix together chicken strips with boiling water and let soak for at least 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic; cook until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes.

Remove chicken from marinade if using and drain excess liquid. Add to skillet with paprika and cayenne pepper (if using). Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes until chicken is cooked through but still has a bit of texture.
Drizzle lemon juice over the chicken to help it crisp up more quickly, and ensure all ingredients are evenly coated with the spice mixture. Cook for about 1-2 more minutes.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish. You can garnish with fresh herbs like parsley or dill if desired.
